name: Tadalafil had small standalone BP effects in healthy subjects but nitrate coadministration remained a major risk
statement: Across tadalafil clinical-development data, standalone tadalafil produced small blood-pressure changes in healthy subjects and 26-week daily 20 mg BP changes similar to placebo in healthy males or mild ED, but nitrate coadministration produced clinically important hypotension signals and remains contraindicated.
population_or_context: Healthy subjects, mild ED, CAD subgroups, and broader tadalafil clinical-development populations.
time_horizon: Clinical pharmacology and trial database including daily 20 mg for 26 weeks.
quantitative_note: Daily tadalafil 20 mg for 26 weeks in healthy male subjects or mild ED had BP changes similar to placebo; MI incidence was 0.43 per 100 patient-years with tadalafil versus 0.6 per 100 patient-years with placebo in the pooled database; sublingual nitroglycerin after tadalafil caused more standing SBP below 85 mm Hg in some studies.

source_locator.quote_or_paraphrase_note: Abstract reports standalone BP effects, daily 20 mg 26-week BP comparison, MI/stroke incidence, and nitrate interaction data.

caveats: Designed for cardiovascular safety, not cardiovascular benefit.
Trial populations may exclude higher-risk real-world users.
population_profile: Includes healthy male subjects and mild ED, but also mixed clinical-development populations.
tadalafil_exposure: Tadalafil across clinical pharmacology and ED studies, including daily tadalafil 20 mg for 26 weeks.
indication_context: Clinical pharmacology and ED safety evidence.
endpoint_measure: Blood pressure, myocardial infarction incidence, stroke incidence, and nitrate interaction hemodynamics.
effect_estimate: Standalone BP changes small/similar to placebo in healthy/mild ED daily 20 mg; MI 0.43 per 100 patient-years with tadalafil versus 0.6 placebo in pooled database.
safety_findings: Organic nitrate coadministration can produce significant hypotension; tadalafil should not be combined with nitrates.
directness_to_target_population: Moderate for standalone BP safety in healthy men; low for cardiovascular benefit or prevention.
confounding_and_bias_limits: Pooled safety design, industry-era development data, selected subjects, and no randomized event-prevention test.
class_transfer_limits: Direct tadalafil evidence; benefit transfer is limited because the record evaluates cardiovascular effects and safety rather than preventive efficacy.
